title: Validate Meshtastic NodeDB peer sync with real BLE app
description: Hardware validation follow-up from project-LICHEN-t2hn.6.4. Once physical radios/boards and real BLE phone/app are available, validate Meshtastic-compatible NodeDB sync with multiple discovered LICHEN peers: self first, deterministic peer ordering, collision omission/tracking, bounded default 3-peer cap, queue completion, app display behavior, and no regressions from qemu/native_sim-only assumptions.
